tags.alt_name: Seattle City Volunteer Park Reservoir Dam
tags.name: Volunteer Park Reservoir Dam
Shoreline Restoration Area
tags.note: Conservation area for native vegetation and wildlife. No entry. Access to Lake Union is north of the fence. No offleash dogs allowed.
intention: functionally equivalent to slipway scheme

tags.description: Guerilla street art mosaic known locally as "Saint Rat" depicting a rat positioned above the text "Hot Rat Summer"
tags.name: Hot Rat Summer

tags.description: Small unnamed stony outcrop in the middle of the Duwamish River. Nicknames have been suggested but are not in widespread use.
tags.note: Small rock in the river, will investigate soon for more updates. Does appear on Google Maps.

tags.description: Seattle's first public fountain, a shallow basin covered with blue tile, with stone animal figures around the rim.
tags.name: Prefontaine Fountain
